queries.query: optimal conditions for growing wheat on Mars greenhouse
key_findings: Crops: Lettuce (30-45d), Potatoes (70-120d), Radish (21-30d), Beans/Peas (50-70d), Herbs
Optimal temps: 15-22C leafy, 16-20C potato, 18-25C legumes
Humidity: 50-70% RH target
PAR: 150-250 umol/m2/s leafy, 200-400 potato
CO2: 800-1200 ppm optimal
pH: 5.5-6.5 hydroponic solution
Mars gravity: 38% Earth (3.721 m/s2)
Mars pressure: 6-7 mbar, greenhouse must be sealed/pressurized
Mars irradiance: ~43% of Earth, artificial lighting mandatory

queries.query: plant stress detection nutrient deficiency disease symptoms
key_findings: 7 stress categories: Water, Salinity, Temperature, Nutrient, Light, CO2, Hypoxia
N deficiency: yellowing older leaves, reduced growth
K deficiency: leaf edge browning, weak stems
Fe deficiency: yellowing young leaves (interveinal chlorosis)
Heat stress thresholds: Lettuce >25C, Radish >26C, Beans >30C, Potatoes >25-28C
AI stress response: Detect -> Match symptoms -> Validate -> Correct -> Monitor

queries.query: water recycling nutrient management closed loop hydroponic system
key_findings: Hydroponic methods: NFT, DWC, Drip Irrigation
Closed-loop: water recycling, nutrient reuse, waste minimization
Key nutrients: N-P-K + micronutrients
AI controls: flow rates, nutrient concentration, aeration, delivery timing

queries.query: Mars radiation protection greenhouse shielding crop resilience
key_findings: Mars lacks global magnetic field - higher radiation
Greenhouse structure provides shielding
Material selection contributes to radiation shielding
Sensor/electronic systems need protection

queries.query: crop varieties suitable for space controlled environment agriculture
key_findings: Portfolio: 40-50% Potatoes, 20-30% Legumes, 15-20% Leafy greens, 5-10% Radish+Herbs
Crew: 4 astronauts, ~12,000 kcal/day total, 360-540g protein/day
Caloric backbone: potatoes (77 kcal/100g, 4-8 kg/m2/cycle)
Protein security: beans/peas (80-120 kcal, 5-9g protein/100g)
Micronutrient: lettuce (Vit K, A, folate)
Psychological: herbs (basil, chives) for crew morale

knowledge_base_documents_discovered.name: From Mars to Earth Innovation Impact
